objects.description: [VOID MANTICORE](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1055) has utilized legitimate disk encryption utilities to increase likelihood of encrypting system drives and reduce system recovery efforts.(Citation: Check Point VOID MANTICORE Handala Hack March 2026)(Citation: DOJ FBI Handala Hack March 2026)
